Objects.Name: [Module] Numbered Switch Area
Objects.Notes: An area that checks the number of times a switch has been activated.

Classes.Name: NumberedSwitchArea
Classes.Notes: An area that outputs an SW_A signal when an external Switch is activated a specified number of times while the player is inside it.

Obj_arg0.Name: Switch Count
Obj_arg0.Description: The amount of SW_B activations required to activate SW_A.

SW_A.Description: Activates when SW_B is activated the specified amount of times.
